About Us

We are a clinical stage, vertically integrated technology company focused on solving some of medicine's hardest problems and most serious unmet medical needs.

Get to know us

Technologies

From neural recording electronics to laser projection optics, we develop the full range of technologies needed for tomorrow's most advanced medical devices.

Learn more

Interested in joining our growing team? Explore our current openings.
